flows: users -> areas — type=association; label=""; explanation="users have areas"
users -> categories — type=association; label=""; explanation="users belong to categories"
users -> notifications — type=association; label=""; explanation="users receive notifications"
users -> reports — type=association; label=""; explanation="users create reports"
areas -> categories — type=association; label=""; explanation="areas belong to categories"
categories -> reports — type=association; label=""; explanation="categories have reports"
flow 1: user creates a report, which is associated with a category and an area, and is sent to the user for review.
the diagram models a system with multiple interconnected classes representing users, areas, categories, notifications, and reports.
users can create reports, which are categorized and associated with specific areas.
each entity has attributes and operations defined for managing their data and interactions.
the system uses a call-return model for interaction, making it easier to debug and adapt to applications with well-defined workflows.
utente -> ui — type=message; label="inserisci credenziali (email, password)"; explanation="user inputs credentials"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="signin(email, password)"; explanation="ui sends credentials to authentication service"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="credenziali valide"; explanation="authentication service returns valid credentials"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="restituisce token"; explanation="authentication service returns token"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="recupera dati utente (uid dal token)"; explanation="authentication service retrieves user data"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="restituisce dati utente"; explanation="authentication service returns user data"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="credenziali errate"; explanation="authentication service returns invalid credentials"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="errore login (es. password errata)"; explanation="authentication service returns login error"
flow 1: utente -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui (valid credentials)
utente inputs credentials
ui sends credentials to firebaseauthentication
firebaseauthentication returns valid credentials
ui receives valid credentials
flow 2: utente -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui (invalid credentials)
firebaseauthentication returns invalid credentials
ui receives invalid credentials
this diagram models the login process for a system using firebase authentication.
the main flow involves the user entering their credentials, which are validated and sent to the firebase authentication service.
if the credentials are valid, the service returns a token and user data, allowing access to the system.
if the credentials are invalid, an error message is returned to the ui.
the diagram includes a loop for validating input and correcting credentials if necessary.
key edge cases include successful login and login failure due to incorrect credentials.
utente -> ui — type=message; label="inserisci dati registrazione"; explanation="utente invia dati di registrazione"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="creaaccount(email, password)"; explanation="ui richiede creazione account"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="validazione dati"; explanation="ui riceve dati validati"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="[dati validi] token di autenticazione"; explanation="ui riceve token di autenticazione"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="salva utente nel sistema"; explanation="ui riceve conferma salvataggio"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="salvautente(nome, email, token)"; explanation="ui invia dati per salvataggio"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="conferma salvataggio"; explanation="ui riceve conferma salvataggio"
ui -> firebaseauthentication — type=message; label="[dati non validi] errore registrazione"; explanation="ui riceve errore di registrazione"
firebaseauthentication -> ui — type=message; label="conferma registrazione avvenuta o errore"; explanation="ui riceve conferma di registrazione o errore"
flow 1: utente -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui -> firebaseauthentication -> ui
this sequence diagram models the registration process for a new user in a system.
the main flow starts with the user entering registration data through the ui.
the ui then sends the registration data to firebase authentication for account creation.
if the data is valid, firebase authentication returns a token and confirms the user's save.
if the data is invalid, firebase authentication returns an error message.
the ui receives confirmation of successful registration or an error message.
the diagram captures both successful and unsuccessful registration scenarios.
ui -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="carica immagine(immagine)"; explanation="upload image"
ui -> firebasestorage — type=message; label="url immagine salvata"; explanation="save image url"
ui -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="cerca ente competente più vicino(coordinate, urgenza)"; explanation="search nearest competent entity"
ui -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="ente più vicino trovato (dati ente)"; explanation="found nearest entity (entity data)"
ui -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="salvasegnalazione(datisegnalazione + url immagine + dati ente)"; explanation="save report with image url and entity data"
ui -> firebasefirestore — type=message; label="conferma salvataggio segnalazione"; explanation="confirm report saving"

flow 1: utente -> ui — "inserisci segnalazione (descrizione, immagine, coordinate, urgenza)" -> ui -> firebasefirestore — "carica immagine(immagine)" -> ui -> firebasestorage — "url immagine salvata" -> ui -> firebasefirestore — "cerca ente competente più vicino(coordinate, urgenza)" -> ui -> firebasefirestore — "ente più vicino trovato (dati ente)" -> ui -> firebasefirestore — "salvasegnalazione(datisegnalazione + url immagine + dati ente)" -> ui -> firebasefirestore — "conferma salvataggio segnalazione" -> ui -> utente — "conferma invio segnalazione con ente assegnato"
this sequence diagram models the process of creating a report with assignment to a competent entity.
the user inputs a report with details such as description, image, coordinates, and urgency.
the ui interacts with firebase firestore and firebase storage to upload the image and save the report with the assigned entity data.
the process includes validation of input data, searching for the nearest competent entity, and confirming the report saving.
the diagram highlights the interaction between the user, ui, firebase firestore, and firebase storage, ensuring the report is correctly processed and saved.
